problem id: 0a1326f4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(7) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  01100010 -> 00011000
  11110101 -> 10111101
  01000010 -> 00010000
  00100101 -> 10001001
  00010011 -> 10000100
  10111110 -> 00101111
  10110010 -> 00101100
  11011010 -> 00110110
  00111001 -> 10001110

query: 01011001
predicted answer: 10010110
